title: Uplink and downlink synchronization procedures
abstract: Uplink and downlink synchronization procedures are described for wireless communications. A base station may send a reconfiguration message to a wireless device before a random access procedure. The reconfiguration message may set an active uplink index and an active downlink index to the same value.
claims: 1. A method comprising: transmitting, by a base station and for beam failure recovery, a first active downlink bandwidth part (BWP) index for a cell and a first active uplink BWP index for the cell that are set to a same value by the base station; and transmitting, via a first active downlink BWP associated with the first active downlink BWP index, a random access response to a random access preamble for beam failure recovery.
